---
title: "plot evolutionary trajectory for multiple models"
author: "Andrea Chen"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: pdf_document
---

# parameter for plotting
```{r setup, include=FALSE}
dataset_name <- "fluc_env"
date <- "5_19"

# set these once for your machine / project
analysis_root <- "../zc524/collective_behavior_evo/figure/1_26_fluctuating_env"
base_plot_folder     <- file.path("../zc524/collective_behavior_evo/figure/plots", date)
r_data_folder    <- file.path("../zc524/collective_behavior_evo/figure", "r_data", dataset_name)

library(MetBrewer)

if (!dir.exists(base_plot_folder)) {
  dir.create(base_plot_folder, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
}

met_brewer_pallete <- "Austria"  # color pattern for lines
```

# load evolutionary trajectory data
```{r}
fluc_data_df <- readRDS(paste0(r_data_folder, "/data_summary.rds"))
```

```{r}
fluc_data_df$z_opt_abs <- abs(fluc_data_df$z_opt)
```

```{r}
fluc_data_df$fitness_mean_norm <- fluc_data_df$fitness_mean / 0.0087186
fluc_data_df$fitness_sd_norm <- fluc_data_df$fitness_sd / 0.0005019642
fluc_data_df$a_z_diff <- fluc_data_df$z_mean - fluc_data_df$a_mean
```

```{r}
unique(fluc_data_df$shift_size)
unique(fluc_data_df$gap)
unique(fluc_data_df$psi)
```

```{r}
colname = c("z_mean", "optimum")  # column to plot
plot_folder = file.path(base_plot_folder, paste(colname, collapse = "_"))

ltys = c(1, 2) # per ycol: solid, dashed

if (!dir.exists(plot_folder)) {
  dir.create(plot_folder, recursive = TRUE)
}

colors_for_psi <- met.brewer(name=met_brewer_pallete, n=4, type="discrete")
psi_col_map <- setNames(colors_for_psi, c(0.0, 0.2, 0.5, 0.8))

# sz=60
# n=50
for (n in c(8)){
  for (gap in c(80)){
    for (sz in c(40)){
      for (reg in c("fit", "ave", "ext")){
        filt_A <- list(reg = reg, psi = 0.0, n = n, shift_size = sz, gap = gap)
        filt_B <- list(reg = reg, psi = 0.2, n = n, shift_size = sz, gap = gap)
        filt_C <- list(reg = reg, psi = 0.5, n = n, shift_size = sz, gap = gap)
        filt_D <- list(reg = reg, psi = 0.8, n = n, shift_size = sz, gap = gap)
        pdf(file.path(plot_folder, paste0("reg_", reg, "_n_", n, "_gap_", gap, "_sz_", sz, ".pdf")), width = 11, height = 8)
        
        title <- paste0(
        if (reg == "inv") "Homogenous group" else
            if (reg == "fit") "copy the best" else
            if (reg == "ext") "copy the extreme" else
                if (reg == "ave") "copy the average",
        " model (n = ", n, ")"
        )
        
        par(cex.axis = 2.5, cex.lab = 2.5, cex.main = 1.0, mar = c(6, 6, 3, 1) + 0.2, mgp = c(3.8, 1.5, 0))

        ylim <- c(-sz/2 -5, sz/2 + 5)
        if ("fitness_mean" %in% colname) {
          ylim <- NULL
        } else if ("z_opt" %in% colname || "z_opt_abs" %in% colname) {
          ylim <- c(0, sz+5)
        }
        # ylim <- c(3, 12)

        fils <- list(filt_A, filt_B, filt_C, filt_D)
        # fils <- list(filt_A, filt_D)
        plot_lines_multi(
            df      = fluc_data_df,
            filters = fils,
            ycol    = colname,  # << choose the column to plot
            labels  = list(
                title = title,
                x = "Generation",  # or any x label you want
                # y = paste(colname, collapse = "/")      # or any y label you want
                y = expression(bar(z))
            ),
            show_rep = TRUE,       # faded per-rep lines? TRUE/FALSE
            cols = psi_col_map[as.character(sapply(fils, function(f) f$psi))],
            ylim = ylim,
            xlim = c(9995, 5*gap + 9995),
            # xcol = "dz1"
            ltys = ltys,
            rep_alpha = 0.2
        )

        # plot_lines_multi_agg_cycle(
        #   df      = fluc_data_df,
        #   filters = fils,
        #   ycol    = colname,  # << choose the column to plot
        #   labels  = list(
        #       title = title,
        #       x = "Generation",  # or any x label you want
        #       y = paste(colname, collapse = "/")      # or any y label you want
        #   ),

        #   show_rep = TRUE,       # faded per-rep lines? TRUE/FALSE
        #   cols = met.brewer(name=met_brewer_pallete, n=length(fils), type="discrete"),
        #   ylim = ylim,
        #   # xlim = c(9990, 3*gap + 9990),
        #   ltys = ltys,
        #   use_cycle_rep = TRUE,
        #   gap_col = "gap",
        #   cycle_start = 10000,       # or NULL if you want first observed tick
        #   cycle_window = c(0, 2*gap - 1),    # first full cycle for gap=10
        #   rep_alpha = 0.1
        # )
        
        # abline(v=10000, lty = 2, col = "black", lwd = 4)

        leg_expr <- as.expression(lapply(fils, function(v) bquote(psi == .(v$psi))))
        legend("topright", bty = "n", legend = leg_expr,
            col = psi_col_map[as.character(sapply(fils, function(f) f$psi))],
            lwd = 3, cex = 2.2)
        dev.off()
      }
    }
  }
}

```

```{r}
integrate_over_window <- function(
  fluc_data_df,
  ycol = "fitness_mean",
  gen_window,
  tick_col = NULL
) {
  if (!is.data.frame(fluc_data_df)) {
    stop("fluc_data_df must be a data.frame")
  }

  if (length(gen_window) != 2) {
    stop("gen_window must be length 2, e.g. c(10000, 10199)")
  }

  if (is.null(tick_col)) {
    if ("tick" %in% names(fluc_data_df)) {
      tick_col <- "tick"
    } else if ("generation" %in% names(fluc_data_df)) {
      tick_col <- "generation"
    } else {
      stop("Could not find tick column. Please provide tick_col.")
    }
  }

  needed_cols <- c(tick_col, ycol, "reg", "n", "shift_size", "psi", "gap", "rep")
  missing_cols <- setdiff(needed_cols, names(fluc_data_df))
  if (length(missing_cols) > 0) {
    stop("Missing required column(s): ", paste(missing_cols, collapse = ", "))
  }

  d <- fluc_data_df

  d[[tick_col]] <- suppressWarnings(as.integer(d[[tick_col]]))
  d[[ycol]]     <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(d[[ycol]]))
  d$n           <- suppressWarnings(as.integer(d$n))
  d$shift_size  <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(d$shift_size))
  d$psi         <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(d$psi))
  d$gap         <- suppressWarnings(as.integer(d$gap))
  d$rep         <- suppressWarnings(as.integer(d$rep))
  d$reg         <- as.character(d$reg)

  keep <- is.finite(d[[tick_col]]) & is.finite(d[[ycol]]) &
          is.finite(d$n) & is.finite(d$shift_size) &
          is.finite(d$psi) & is.finite(d$gap) & is.finite(d$rep) &
          !is.na(d$reg)

  d <- d[keep, , drop = FALSE]

  d <- d[d[[tick_col]] >= gen_window[1] & d[[tick_col]] <= gen_window[2], , drop = FALSE]

  if (nrow(d) == 0) {
    warning("No rows found in the requested generation window.")
    return(data.frame())
  }

  # split by parameter set + rep
  grp <- split(
    d,
    list(d$reg, d$n, d$shift_size, d$psi, d$gap, d$rep),
    drop = TRUE
  )

  out <- lapply(grp, function(x) {
    x <- x[order(x[[tick_col]]), , drop = FALSE]

    data.frame(
      reg = x$reg[1],
      n = x$n[1],
      shift_size = x$shift_size[1],
      psi = x$psi[1],
      gap = x$gap[1],
      rep = x$rep[1],
      gen_start = gen_window[1],
      gen_end = gen_window[2],
      n_gen = nrow(x),
      integral = sum(x[[ycol]], na.rm = TRUE),
      mean_value = mean(x[[ycol]], na.rm = TRUE),
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
  })

  out_df <- do.call(rbind, out)
  rownames(out_df) <- NULL
  out_df
}

fitness_integral <- integrate_over_window(
  fluc_data_df = fluc_data_df,
  ycol = "fitness_mean",
  gen_window = c(10000, 10300),
  tick_col = "tick"
)
```

```{r}
psi0_mean <- aggregate(
  integral ~ reg + n + shift_size + gap,
  data = fitness_integral[fitness_integral$psi == 0, ],
  FUN = mean
)
fitness_integral <- merge(
  fitness_integral,
  psi0_mean,
  by = c("reg", "n", "shift_size", "gap"),
  suffixes = c("", "_psi0")
)
fitness_integral$integral_diff_w_psi_0 <-  fitness_integral$integral - fitness_integral$integral_psi0
```

```{r}
plot_integral_heatmaps <- function(
  integ_df,
  value_col = "integral",
  xlab = "Amplitude",
  ylab = "Frequency",
  file = NULL,
  zlim = NULL,
  palette_fun = function(n) hcl.colors(n, "YlOrRd"),
  sqrt_color = TRUE
) {
  needed <- c("reg", "n", "psi", "shift_size", "gap", value_col)
  miss <- setdiff(needed, names(integ_df))
  if (length(miss) > 0) {
    stop("Missing columns: ", paste(miss, collapse = ", "))
  }

  # aggregate over reps
  d <- aggregate(
    integ_df[[value_col]],
    by = list(
      reg = integ_df$reg,
      n = integ_df$n,
      psi = integ_df$psi,
      shift_size = integ_df$shift_size,
      gap = integ_df$gap
    ),
    FUN = mean
  )
  names(d)[6] <- value_col

  # value used for coloring
  if (sqrt_color) {
    d$color_value <- sign(d[[value_col]]) * sqrt(abs(d[[value_col]]))
  } else {
    d$color_value <- d[[value_col]]
  }

  keys <- unique(d[, c("reg", "n", "psi")])

  if (!is.null(file)) {
    pdf(file, width = 13, height = 8.5)
    on.exit(dev.off(), add = TRUE)
  }

  # zlim should still be provided on the original scale
  if (is.null(zlim)) {
    zlim <- range(d[[value_col]], na.rm = TRUE)
  }

  # transform zlim for color scale
  if (sqrt_color) {
    color_zlim <- sign(zlim) * sqrt(abs(zlim))
  } else {
    color_zlim <- zlim
  }

  col_fun <- colorRampPalette(palette_fun(10))
  cols <- col_fun(100)

  for (i in seq_len(nrow(keys))) {

    subd <- d[
      d$reg == keys$reg[i] &
        d$n == keys$n[i] &
        d$psi == keys$psi[i],
    ]

    x_levels <- sort(unique(subd$shift_size))
    y_levels <- sort(unique(subd$gap))

    nx <- length(x_levels)
    ny <- length(y_levels)

    # map categories → indices
    x_idx <- match(subd$shift_size, x_levels)
    y_idx <- match(subd$gap, y_levels)

    layout(matrix(c(1, 2), nrow = 1), widths = c(1, 0.12))
    par(mar = c(3, 4, 2, 0), mgp = c(4, 1, 0))

    plot(
      NA, NA,
      xlim = c(0.5, nx + 0.5),
      ylim = c(0.5, ny + 0.5),
      xaxt = "n", yaxt = "n",
      main = paste0(
        "reg=", keys$reg[i],
        ", n=", keys$n[i],
        ", psi=", keys$psi[i]
      ),
      cex.axis =2
    )

    # title(ylab = ylab, line = 3.5, cex.lab = 2)
    # draw tiles
    for (j in seq_len(nrow(subd))) {

      val <- subd[[value_col]][j]          # original value
      color_val <- subd$color_value[j]     # sqrt-transformed value

      if (is.finite(color_val) && diff(color_zlim) != 0) {
        col_id <- floor((color_val - color_zlim[1]) / diff(color_zlim) * 99) + 1
        col_id <- max(1, min(100, col_id))
      } else {
        col_id <- NA
      }

      rect(
        xleft   = x_idx[j] - 0.5,
        xright  = x_idx[j] + 0.5,
        ybottom = y_idx[j] - 0.5,
        ytop    = y_idx[j] + 0.5,
        col = ifelse(is.na(col_id), "grey90", cols[col_id]),
        border = "white"
      )

      # text still shows original value
      text(
        x_idx[j],
        y_idx[j],
        round(val, 2),
        cex = 0.8
      )
    }

    axis(1, at = seq_len(nx), labels = x_levels, cex.axis = 1.5)
    axis(2, at = seq_len(ny), labels = paste0("1/", 2 * y_levels), las = 1, cex.axis = 1.5)
    box()

    # title(
    #   main = paste0(
    #     "reg=", keys$reg[i],
    #     ", n=", keys$n[i],
    #     ", psi=", keys$psi[i]
    #   )
    # )

    # color bar
    par(mar = c(4, 2, 3, 4))

    zseq_original <- seq(zlim[1], zlim[2], length.out = 100)

    if (sqrt_color) {
      zseq_color <- sign(zseq_original) * sqrt(abs(zseq_original))
    } else {
      zseq_color <- zseq_original
    }

    image(
      x = 1,
      y = zseq_original,
      z = matrix(zseq_color, nrow = 1),
      col = palette_fun(100),
      xlab = "",
      ylab = "",
      xaxt = "n",
      yaxt = "n"
    )

    axis(4, las = 1)
    mtext(
      if (sqrt_color) {
        paste0(value_col, " color = signed sqrt, text = original")
      } else {
        value_col
      },
      side = 4,
      line = 2.5
    )
  }

  invisible(NULL)
}

plot_folder = file.path(base_plot_folder, "fitness_integral_heatmaps")
dir.create(plot_folder, recursive = TRUE, showWarning = FALSE)
fitness_integral_mean_df <- aggregate(
  integral_diff_w_psi_0 ~ reg + n + psi + shift_size + gap,
  data = fitness_integral,
  FUN = mean
)

fitness_integral_mean_df$frequency_label <- paste0("1/", 2 * fitness_integral_mean_df$gap)

fitness_integral_mean_df_to_plot <- fitness_integral_mean_df[
  fitness_integral_mean_df$reg %in% c("ave", "fit", "ext") &
    fitness_integral_mean_df$n %in% c(8) &
    fitness_integral_mean_df$psi %in% c(0.2, 0.5, 0.8),
]

plot_integral_heatmaps(
  integ_df = fitness_integral_mean_df_to_plot,
  value_col = "integral_diff_w_psi_0",
  file = file.path(plot_folder, "integral_heatmaps.pdf"),
  xlab = expression(Lambda),
  ylab = "Frequency (1 / generations)",
  zlim = c(-0.45, 0.45),
  palette_fun = function(n) {colorRampPalette(c("blue", "white", "red"))(n)},
  sqrt_color = TRUE
)
```


```{r}
gap=20
start_tick = 10010
# post-shift window
post_shift_fluc_data_df <- fluc_data_df[fluc_data_df$tick >= start_tick & fluc_data_df$tick <= (start_tick + 2 * gap) & fluc_data_df$shift_size == 60 & fluc_data_df$gap == gap , ]

# output folder
out_dir <- file.path(base_plot_folder, "gene_summary_compare")
dir.create(out_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

# metrics to plot (rows)
plot_cols <- c(
  "fitness_mean",
  "abs_effect_mean",
  "abs_effect_sd",
  "num_seg_mean",
  "num_seg_sd",
  "seg_site_pop"
)

# nicer y-axis labels
ylab_map <- list(
  fitness_mean    = "Average fitness",
  abs_effect_mean = expression(paste("|g| mean")),
  abs_effect_sd   = expression(paste("|g| sd")),
  num_seg_mean    = "Seg. sites / individual (mean)",
  num_seg_sd      = "Seg. sites / individual (sd)",
  seg_site_pop    = "Total seg. sites"
)

col_combos <- data.frame(
  reg = rep(c("ave", "ext", "fit"), each = 2),
  n   = rep(c(5, 20), times = 3),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

# --------------------------------------------------
# psi values by model
# --------------------------------------------------
psi_map <- list(
  ave = c(0, 0.2, 0.5, 0.8),
  fit = c(0, 0.2, 0.5, 0.8),
  ext = c(0, 0.2, 0.5, 0.8)   # add extra ext psi values here
)


# for common x range across panels
all_psi_vals <- sort(unique(unlist(psi_map)))

# --------------------------------------------------
# CUSTOMIZE THESE TICKS
# --------------------------------------------------
tick_points <- c(
  start = start_tick,
  mid1  = start_tick + gap,
  end   = start_tick + 2*gap
)

point_cols <- c(
  start = "black",
  mid1  = "dodgerblue3",
  end   = "red3"
)

point_pchs <- c(
  start = 16,
  mid1  = 15,
  end   = 18
)

point_ltys <- c(
  start = 1,
  mid1  = 1,
  end   = 1
)

draw_error_bars <- function(x, y, y_sd, cap = 0.03, col = "black") {
  ok <- !(is.na(x) | is.na(y) | is.na(y_sd))
  if (!any(ok)) return(invisible(NULL))
  
  arrows(
    x0 = x[ok], y0 = y[ok] - y_sd[ok],
    x1 = x[ok], y1 = y[ok] + y_sd[ok],
    angle = 90, code = 3, length = cap, col = col
  )
}

# summary structure:
# summary_list[[col]][[tick_name]][[panel_index]] = list(psi=..., mean=..., sd=...)
summary_list <- vector("list", length(plot_cols))
names(summary_list) <- plot_cols

for (col in plot_cols) {
  summary_list[[col]] <- vector("list", length(tick_points))
  names(summary_list[[col]]) <- names(tick_points)
  
  for (pname in names(tick_points)) {
    tick_val <- tick_points[[pname]]
    summary_list[[col]][[pname]] <- vector("list", nrow(col_combos))
    
    for (j in seq_len(nrow(col_combos))) {
      reg_j <- col_combos$reg[j]
      n_j   <- col_combos$n[j]
      
      psi_vals_j <- psi_map[[reg_j]]
      mean_vals  <- rep(NA_real_, length(psi_vals_j))
      sd_vals    <- rep(NA_real_, length(psi_vals_j))
      
      for (i in seq_along(psi_vals_j)) {
        psi_i <- psi_vals_j[i]
        
        sub_df <- post_shift_fluc_data_df[
          post_shift_fluc_data_df$reg  == reg_j &
          post_shift_fluc_data_df$n    == n_j &
          post_shift_fluc_data_df$psi  == psi_i &
          post_shift_fluc_data_df$tick == tick_val,
        ]
        
        if (nrow(sub_df) > 0) {
          mean_vals[i] <- mean(sub_df[[col]], na.rm = TRUE)
          sd_vals[i]   <- sd(sub_df[[col]], na.rm = TRUE)
        }
      }
      
      summary_list[[col]][[pname]][[j]] <- list(
        psi  = psi_vals_j,
        mean = mean_vals,
        sd   = sd_vals
      )
    }
  }
}

# one common y-limit per row, across all selected ticks and all panels
row_ylims <- vector("list", length(plot_cols))
names(row_ylims) <- plot_cols

for (col in plot_cols) {
  all_ymin <- c()
  all_ymax <- c()
  
  for (pname in names(tick_points)) {
    for (j in seq_len(nrow(col_combos))) {
      mean_vals <- summary_list[[col]][[pname]][[j]]$mean
      sd_vals   <- summary_list[[col]][[pname]][[j]]$sd
      
      ok <- !(is.na(mean_vals) | is.na(sd_vals))
      if (any(ok)) {
        all_ymin <- c(all_ymin, mean_vals[ok] - sd_vals[ok])
        all_ymax <- c(all_ymax, mean_vals[ok] + sd_vals[ok])
      }
    }
  }
  
  ymin <- min(all_ymin, na.rm = TRUE)
  ymax <- max(all_ymax, na.rm = TRUE)
  yrng <- ymax - ymin
  
  if (!is.finite(yrng) || yrng == 0) yrng <- 1
  
  row_ylims[[col]] <- c(
    ymin - 0.08 * yrng,
    ymax + 0.08 * yrng
  )
}

# output file
pdf(
  file.path(out_dir, paste0("summary_gap_", gap, ".pdf")),
  width = 18, height = 16
)

par(
  mfrow = c(length(plot_cols), nrow(col_combos)),
  mar = c(2.2, 2.6, 2.0, 0.8),
  oma = c(4, 6, 4, 1)
)

for (r in seq_along(plot_cols)) {
  col_name <- plot_cols[r]
  ylim_use <- row_ylims[[col_name]]
  
  for (j in seq_len(nrow(col_combos))) {
    reg_j <- col_combos$reg[j]
    n_j   <- col_combos$n[j]
    psi_vals_j <- psi_map[[reg_j]]
    
    plot(
      NA, NA,
      xlim = range(all_psi_vals),
      ylim = ylim_use,
      xaxt = "n",
      yaxt = "n",
      xlab = "",
      ylab = ""
    )
    
    for (pname in names(tick_points)) {
      psi_vals  <- summary_list[[col_name]][[pname]][[j]]$psi
      mean_vals <- summary_list[[col_name]][[pname]][[j]]$mean
      sd_vals   <- summary_list[[col_name]][[pname]][[j]]$sd
      
      lines(
        psi_vals, mean_vals,
        type = "b",
        pch = point_pchs[pname],
        lwd = 2,
        lty = point_ltys[pname],
        col = point_cols[pname]
      )
      
      draw_error_bars(
        psi_vals, mean_vals, sd_vals,
        col = point_cols[pname]
      )
    }
    
    abline(v = 0, lty = 2, col = "grey50")
    
    # x-axis only on bottom row
    if (r == length(plot_cols)) {
      axis(1, at = psi_vals_j, labels = psi_vals_j, cex.axis = 0.9)
    } else {
      axis(1, at = psi_vals_j, labels = FALSE, tck = -0.02)
    }
    
    # y-axis only on first column
    if (j == 1) {
      axis(2, cex.axis = 0.9)
      mtext(ylab_map[[col_name]], side = 2, line = 3.8, cex = 0.9)
    } else {
      axis(2, labels = FALSE, tck = -0.02)
    }
    
    if (r == 1) {
      title(main = paste0(reg_j, ", n = ", n_j), cex.main = 1)
    }
    
    box()
  }
}

legend(
  "top",
  inset = -0.02,
  xpd = NA,
  horiz = TRUE,
  bty = "n",
  legend = paste0(names(tick_points), " (", tick_points, ")"),
  col = point_cols[names(tick_points)],
  pch = point_pchs[names(tick_points)],
  lty = point_ltys[names(tick_points)],
  lwd = 2,
  cex = 1.0
)

mtext(expression(psi), side = 1, outer = TRUE, line = 2.2, cex = 1.2)
mtext("Post-shift summary statistics at selected generations", side = 3, outer = TRUE, line = 1.5, cex = 1.3)

dev.off()
```



```{r}
colname = c("a_sd", "n")  # column to plot
plot_folder = file.path(base_plot_folder, paste(colname, collapse = "_"))

if (!dir.exists(plot_folder)) {
  dir.create(plot_folder, recursive = TRUE)
}

for (r in c("fit", "ext", "ave")) {
    pre_data <- fluc_data_df[
      fluc_data_df$tick == 9999 &
      fluc_data_df$reg == r &
      fluc_data_df$psi %in% c(0.0, 0.2, 0.5, 0.8) &
      fluc_data_df$n <= 100,
    ]
    
    filt_A <- list(reg = r, psi = 0.0)
    filt_B <- list(reg = r, psi = 0.2)
    filt_C <- list(reg = r, psi = 0.5)
    filt_D <- list(reg = r, psi = 0.8)
    pdf(file.path(plot_folder, paste0("reg_", r, ".pdf")), width = 11.5, height = 8)

    title <- paste0(
    if (r == "inv") "Homogenous group" else
        if (r == "fit") "copy the best" else
        if (r == "ext") "copy the extreme" else
            if (r == "ave") "copy the average",
    " model"
    )

    par(cex.axis = 2.5, cex.lab = 2.5, cex.main = 1.0, mar = c(6, 6, 3, 1) + 0.2, mgp = c(3.8, 1.5, 0))

    fils = list(filt_A, filt_B, filt_C, filt_D)
    plot_lines_multi(
        df      = pre_data,
        filters = fils,
        ycol    = "z_sd",  # << choose the column to plot
        labels  = list(
            title = title,
            x = "n",  # or any x label you want
            y = expression(z[sd])      # or any y label you want
        ),
        show_rep = FALSE,       # faded per-rep lines? TRUE/FALSE
        cols = met.brewer(name=met_brewer_pallete, n=length(fils), type="discrete"),
        ylim = c(0, 20),
        # xlim = c(2, 20),
        xcol = "n",
        ltys = ltys
    )
    
    # abline(a = 0, b = 1, lty = 2, col = "black", lwd = 2)

    leg_expr <- as.expression(lapply(fils, function(v) bquote(psi == .(v$psi))))
    legend("topright", bty = "n", legend = leg_expr,
        col = met.brewer(name=met_brewer_pallete, n=length(fils), type="discrete"),
        lwd = 3, cex = 2.2)
    dev.off()
}
```

```{r}
# pre-shift window
df_to_use <- fluc_data_df[fluc_data_df$tick == 10000, ]

# output folder
out_dir <- file.path(base_plot_folder, "genetic_summary")
dir.create(out_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

# metrics to plot (rows)
plot_cols <- c(
  "fitness_mean",
  "abs_effect_mean",
  "abs_effect_sd",
  "num_seg_mean",
  "num_seg_sd",
  "seg_site_pop"
)

# # metrics to plot (rows)
# plot_cols <- c(
#   "a_sd",
#   "num_fixed_mut",
#   "z_sd",
#   "num_seg_mean",
#   "num_seg_sd",
#   "seg_site_pop"
# )

# nicer y-axis labels
ylab_map <- list(
  fitness_mean    = "Average fitness",
  abs_effect_mean = expression(paste("|g| mean")),
  abs_effect_sd   = expression(paste("|g| sd")),
  num_seg_mean    = "Seg. sites / individual (mean)",
  num_seg_sd      = "Seg. sites / individual (sd)",
  seg_site_pop    = "Total seg. sites",
  a_sd            = expression(g[sd]),
  z_sd            = expression(z[sd]),
  num_fixed_mut   = "Number of fixed mutations"
)

# col_combos <- data.frame(
#   reg = rep(c("ave", "ext", "fit"), each = 2),
#   n   = rep(c(8), times = 3),
#   stringsAsFactors = FALSE
# )
col_combos <- data.frame(reg = c("ave", "ext", "fit"), n = c(8, 8, 8), stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
# psi values by model
psi_map <- list(
  ave = c(0, 0.2, 0.5, 0.8),
  fit = c(0, 0.2, 0.5, 0.8),
  ext = c(0, 0.2, 0.5, 0.8)   # add extra ext psi values here
)

# common x range across all panels
all_psi_vals <- sort(unique(unlist(psi_map)))

# helper for drawing error bars
draw_error_bars <- function(x, y, y_sd, cap = 0.03) {
  ok <- !(is.na(x) | is.na(y) | is.na(y_sd))
  if (!any(ok)) return(invisible(NULL))
  
  arrows(
    x0 = x[ok], y0 = y[ok] - y_sd[ok],
    x1 = x[ok], y1 = y[ok] + y_sd[ok],
    angle = 90, code = 3, length = cap
  )
}

# precompute summaries:
# summary_list[[col]][[panel_index]] = list(psi=..., mean=..., sd=...)
summary_list <- vector("list", length(plot_cols))
names(summary_list) <- plot_cols

for (col in plot_cols) {
  summary_list[[col]] <- vector("list", nrow(col_combos))
  
  for (j in seq_len(nrow(col_combos))) {
    reg_j <- col_combos$reg[j]
    n_j   <- col_combos$n[j]
    psi_vals_j <- psi_map[[reg_j]]
    
    mean_vals <- rep(NA_real_, length(psi_vals_j))
    sd_vals   <- rep(NA_real_, length(psi_vals_j))
    
    for (i in seq_along(psi_vals_j)) {
      psi_i <- psi_vals_j[i]
      
      sub_df <- df_to_use[
        df_to_use$reg == reg_j &
        df_to_use$n   == n_j &
        df_to_use$psi == psi_i,
      ]
      
      if (nrow(sub_df) > 0) {
        mean_vals[i] <- mean(sub_df[[col]], na.rm = TRUE)
        sd_vals[i]   <- sd(sub_df[[col]], na.rm = TRUE)
      }
    }
    
    summary_list[[col]][[j]] <- list(
      psi  = psi_vals_j,
      mean = mean_vals,
      sd   = sd_vals
    )
  }
}

# one common y-limit per row
row_ylims <- vector("list", length(plot_cols))
names(row_ylims) <- plot_cols

for (col in plot_cols) {
  all_ymin <- c()
  all_ymax <- c()
  
  for (j in seq_len(nrow(col_combos))) {
    mean_vals <- summary_list[[col]][[j]]$mean
    sd_vals   <- summary_list[[col]][[j]]$sd
    
    ok <- !(is.na(mean_vals) | is.na(sd_vals))
    if (any(ok)) {
      all_ymin <- c(all_ymin, mean_vals[ok] - sd_vals[ok])
      all_ymax <- c(all_ymax, mean_vals[ok] + sd_vals[ok])
    }
  }
  
  ymin <- min(all_ymin, na.rm = TRUE)
  ymax <- max(all_ymax, na.rm = TRUE)
  yrng <- ymax - ymin
  if (!is.finite(yrng) || yrng == 0) yrng <- 1
  
  row_ylims[[col]] <- c(
    ymin - 0.08 * yrng,
    ymax + 0.08 * yrng
  )
}

# output file
pdf(
  file.path(out_dir, "pre_shift_summary_trends_multipanel.pdf"),
  width = 18, height = 16
)

par(
  mfrow = c(length(plot_cols), nrow(col_combos)),
  mar = c(2.2, 2.6, 2.0, 0.8),
  oma = c(4, 6, 3, 1)
)

for (r in seq_along(plot_cols)) {
  col_name <- plot_cols[r]
  ylim_use <- row_ylims[[col_name]]
  
  for (j in seq_len(nrow(col_combos))) {
    reg_j <- col_combos$reg[j]
    n_j   <- col_combos$n[j]
    
    psi_vals_j <- summary_list[[col_name]][[j]]$psi
    mean_vals  <- summary_list[[col_name]][[j]]$mean
    sd_vals    <- summary_list[[col_name]][[j]]$sd
    
    plot(
      psi_vals_j, mean_vals,
      type = "b",
      pch = 16,
      lwd = 2,
      xaxt = "n",
      yaxt = "n",
      xlab = "",
      ylab = "",
      xlim = range(all_psi_vals),
      ylim = ylim_use
    )
    
    draw_error_bars(psi_vals_j, mean_vals, sd_vals)
    abline(v = 0, lty = 2, col = "grey50")
    
    # x-axis only on bottom row
    if (r == length(plot_cols)) {
      axis(1, at = psi_vals_j, labels = psi_vals_j, cex.axis = 0.9)
    } else {
      axis(1, at = psi_vals_j, labels = FALSE, tck = -0.02)
    }
    
    # y-axis only on first column
    if (j == 1) {
      axis(2, cex.axis = 0.9)
      mtext(ylab_map[[col_name]], side = 2, line = 3.8, cex = 0.9)
    } else {
      axis(2, labels = FALSE, tck = -0.02)
    }
    
    # titles only on top row
    if (r == 1) {
      title(main = paste0(reg_j, ", n = ", n_j), cex.main = 1)
    }
    
    box()
  }
}

mtext(expression(psi), side = 1, outer = TRUE, line = 2.2, cex = 1.2)
mtext("Pre-shift summary statistics", side = 3, outer = TRUE, line = 1, cex = 1.3)

dev.off()
```
